title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: A workflow pattern that routes different phases of frontend development to different models: Claude Opus for planning and reasoning, Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design and code generation. The approach composes complementary model strengths rather than selecting a single model, with handoff documents enabling task routing and iteration.
